name: Pharyngitis / Sore Throat Diagnosis Codes
description: ICD-10-CM codes for acute pharyngitis and tonsillitis diagnoses. Used in the appropriate testing for pharyngitis (CWP) measure to identify episodes requiring Group A streptococcus testing.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets

codes.description: Acute pharyngitis due to other specified organisms
Acute tonsillitis due to other specified organisms
Acute recurrent tonsillitis due to other specified organisms
